title: berkheya buphthalmoides
intro: Berkheya buphthalmoides, also known as Golden Burr, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, which is attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Berkheya buphthalmoides include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditional herbal preparations of Berkheya buphthalmoides include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
